case_title: SUE ANN MADRID VS. DAN MCCARTHY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MADRID, SUE ANN AS TO DEFENDANT MCCARTHY, DAN AN INDIVIDUAL DBA DAN MCCARTHY ROOFING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MADRID, SUE ANN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCARTHY, DAN AN INDIVIDUAL DBA DAN MCCARTHY ROOFING $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $151.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $751.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FULL SATISFACTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MADRID, SUE ANN AS TO DEFENDANT MCCARTHY, DAN AN INDIVIDUAL DBA DAN MCCARTHY ROOFING
